dialogue: A power nap's worth a thousand emails.
visual: Urban professionals, tech employees, and travelers in sleek, modern offices lounging in high-tech sleep pods.
Close-up reactions of individuals in the sleep pods looking expectantly towards a hidden corner of the room.
As the camera pans, we see a CEO sneaking into a sleep pod, dressed in a superhero costume with a cape.

dialogue: Not the actual superhero plan we had in mind.

visual: Cut to the Sleep Pod Office Rentals platform interface showcasing easy booking options and professionals returning to work refreshed and energized.
